creative_brief: Split frame: left side shows a child at a dinner table looking curiously at her plate, warm kitchen lighting. Right side shows a sunlit pasture with cattle grazing. Text overlay at bottom: 'Straight from farm to hub.'
primary_text:
Last week I opened a pack of supermarket beef. The fine print said it travelled thousands of km and sat in cold storage for up to three weeks.

Then I opened a box from FarmThru. Grass-fed beef from a named NSW farm. Straight from farm to hub.

Same country. Completely different food system.

Zero middlemen. Order online, collect from Brookvale. No commitment.

Be part of what we're building.

See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
headline: Same country, different food system
description: Farm-direct grocery. Straight from farm to hub. Collect from Brookvale.
